label.description: The field label displayed in the edit screen

type.description: Field type identifier. Must be "date_picker" for this field type.

name.description: The field name used to save/load data. Auto-generated from label if not provided.

key.description: Unique field key. Auto-generated if not provided.

instructions.description: Instructions displayed to editors below the field label

conditional_logic.description: Conditional logic rules. Set to false to disable, or provide rules array.

default_value.description: Default value when creating new content

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown in empty fields

prepend.description: Text to prepend before the input

append.description: Text to append after the input

allow_in_bindings.description: Whether this field can be used in block bindings

display_format.description: PHP date format for displaying the date when editing (e.g., "d/m/Y", "m/d/Y", "F j, Y"). See PHP date() documentation for format options.

return_format.description: PHP date format for the value returned via template functions (e.g., "d/m/Y", "m/d/Y", "F j, Y", "Ymd"). See PHP date() documentation for format options.

first_day.description: Which day the week starts on in the date picker (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday, etc.)

default_to_current_date.description: Use the current date as the default value when creating new content
